examples.title: Data Ingestion Pipeline
examples.description: Basic structure for cloud data ingestion
examples.code:
ALGORITHM IngestData
BEGIN
  1. Read stream from Kafka
  2. Validate schema
  3. Partition by timestamp
  4. Write to cloud storage
END
examples.explanation: Shows typical steps in real-time data ingestion

examples.title: Spark Data Processing
examples.description: Sample PySpark code for cloud data transformation
examples.code:
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession

spark = SparkSession.builder.appName('CloudETL').getOrCreate()
df = spark.read.parquet('s3://bucket/raw-data')
transformed = df.groupBy('category').agg({'value':'mean'})
transformed.write.parquet('s3://bucket/processed-data')
examples.explanation: Demonstrates reading/writing data from cloud storage using Spark

examples.title: BigQuery Analytics
examples.description: Example analytical query on cloud data warehouse
examples.code:
SELECT 
  user_id,
  COUNT(*) AS sessions,
  AVG(duration) AS avg_duration
FROM 
  `project.dataset.events`
WHERE 
  event_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-03-31'
GROUP BY 
  user_id
HAVING 
  sessions > 5
examples.explanation: Shows typical aggregation on cloud-native data warehouse
